configuration.title: Filemarks
configuration.autoReveal.description: Automatically reveal the active file's bookmark in the Filemarks view
configuration.saveBookmarksInProject.des: Save bookmarks in project's .vscode folder (true) or global storage (false)
configuration.navigateThroughAllFiles.de: Navigate through bookmarks across all files when jumping (true) or only within current file (false)
configuration.showBookmarkNotDefinedWarn: Show warning message when jumping to a bookmark number that doesn't exist
configuration.revealLocation.description: Where to position the cursor when jumping to a bookmark
viewsWelcome.filemarks.treeView.empty.co:
No bookmarks yet.

Quick Start:
• Toggle bookmark: `Ctrl+Alt+[0-9]`
• Jump to bookmark: `Ctrl+[0-9]`
• Auto bookmark: `Ctrl+Alt+P`
• Previous bookmark: `Ctrl+Alt+[`
• Next bookmark: `Ctrl+Alt+]`
• Focus sidebar: `Ctrl+Shift+B`

*macOS: Use `Cmd` instead of `Ctrl`*

[Create Folder](command:filemarks.createFolder)
[Import Bookmarks (JSON)](command:filemarks.importBookmarksJson)
[Learn More](https://github.com/gyuha/vscode-filemarks#readme)
